title: The Beast of Blackridge
author: CYOA Engine
description: A great beast descends from the high woods and crags above Blackridge, slaughtering livestock and villagers alike. With a rich bounty offered for its death, you set out into the forest and mountains to hunt it down.

blackridge_village.title: Blackridge Village
blackridge_village.text: You arrive in Blackridge at dusk, a small mountain village huddled beneath the shadow of dark pines and broken crags. Fear hangs over the square. The village elder steps forward and tells you of the beast that comes down from the heights to kill sheep, cattle, and sometimes people. Two hunters have already vanished. He offers a bounty of eighty crowns to whoever ends the terror. You have little coin and fewer prospects. The hunt is too rich to refuse.

imagePrompt.subject: Small mountain village square of timber and stone cottages beneath dark pine-covered slopes, anxious villagers gathered near a weathered elder

choices.text: Visit the village merchant
Speak to the hunters by the fire
Head straight for the woods
Refuse the hunt and leave Blackridge behind

village_merchant.title: The Village Merchant
village_merchant.text: A leathery old trader has laid out practical goods beneath a patched canvas awning: rope, bait meat, knives, and bottles of bitter tonic. He eyes you up and down and names his prices without shame.

imagePrompt.subject: Rough village trader stall with ropes, dried meat, bottles and knives laid out under a canvas awning in a cold mountain settlement
imagePrompt.exclude: luxury goods, bright colours, large city elements

choices.text: Buy rope for 8 gold
Buy bait meat for 6 gold
Buy a throwing knife for 12 gold
Drink a bitter tonic for 10 gold and restore 25 health
Ask whether anyone else has tried to kill the beast
Leave the village and enter the woods

hunters_fire.title: Hunters' Fire
hunters_fire.text: Two grim-faced hunters warm their hands at a low fire. They tell you the beast is no mindless animal. It circles traps, avoids spears, and moves between the high trees and the rocks above the forest. One of them swears it can be drawn by fresh bait, but only for a moment before it turns wild. If you wound it, it will flee uphill to its lair.

imagePrompt.subject: Two hard-faced hunters beside a low campfire near a woodpile, speaking in hushed tones with pine forest and mountains behind

choices.text: Visit the merchant before you leave
Take what you have learned and enter the woods

forest_edge.title: Forest Edge
forest_edge.text: The last cottages fall behind you. Ahead, the lower woods gather thick and dark at the feet of the mountains. Mist lingers between the trunks, and the path divides where roots break the earth. One way follows an old cart track. The other slips into deeper shadow where game trails wind between stones and bracken.

imagePrompt.subject: Narrow track entering dark evergreen woods at the foot of steep mountains, mist hanging between trunks and roots crossing the ground

choices.text: Take the old cart track
Take the narrow game trail

bandit_ambush.title: Bandit Ambush
bandit_ambush.text: The old track narrows between fallen trees. Rough voices call out from both sides as armed bandits step from the brush with clubs, axes, and knives. They have no interest in the beast, only in what coin they think you carry.

imagePrompt.subject: Armed roadside bandits emerging from brush and fallen trees on a forest path, weapons drawn in a mountain woodland ambush

choices.text: Fight the bandits
Throw them 10 gold and keep moving
Use your throwing knife to distract them and slip into the trees

wolf_hollow.title: Wolf Hollow
wolf_hollow.text: You descend into a hollow where the light fades beneath thick boughs. Low growls ripple through the brush. Lean grey wolves circle between roots and stone, driven bold by hunger and the strange fear that grips the forest.

imagePrompt.subject: Lean grey wolves circling in a shadowy forest hollow strewn with roots and stones, eyes fixed from the darkness
imagePrompt.exclude: fantasy monsters, snow, people holding torches

choices.text: Fight through the wolves
Use your rope to climb above them and wait them out
Throw down your bait meat and move on while they tear at it

hidden_stash.title: Hidden Stash
hidden_stash.text: Behind a tumble of roots and broken stone, you spot the remains of a hidden cache. A torn satchel lies half-buried beneath damp leaves. Inside, you find a clutch of old crowns that some outlaw clearly meant to recover later.

imagePrompt.subject: Small concealed bandit cache tucked beneath roots and broken stone, with a worn satchel and scattered coins in the undergrowth

choices.text: Push deeper into the woods

blood_clearing.title: The Blood Clearing
blood_clearing.text: You come upon a wide clearing torn apart by violence. The ground is churned into mud. Broken saplings lean at odd angles. The remains of slaughtered livestock lie scattered in the grass, and the stink of blood hangs heavy in the air. Whatever made this mess is close.

imagePrompt.subject: Forest clearing torn apart by claw marks and bloodied livestock remains, churned mud and broken saplings beneath looming trees

choices.text: Place bait in the clearing and wait for the beast
Set a crude trap among the broken saplings
Ignore the clearing and follow the tracks uphill

beast_lured.title: Beast at Dusk
beast_lured.text: The bait does its work. At dusk, the beast bursts from the treeline in a blur of muscle and scarred fur, larger than any wolf and heavier than a bear. You strike at it in the confusion and drive it back, but not before it tears into you. Wounded, it crashes away uphill toward the mountains.

imagePrompt.subject: Massive scarred beast bursting from treeline at dusk into a torn forest clearing, low and muscular like a monstrous bear-wolf hybrid

choices.text: Follow the beast's blood trail into the mountains

beast_trapped.title: The Trap Springs
beast_trapped.text: Your trap is crude, but the beast's fury drives it straight into the danger. It snarls as wood and cord bite into its flank. You manage to wound it before it hurls itself free and vanishes uphill. The fight costs you blood, but the beast is hurt now.

imagePrompt.subject: Huge scarred forest beast thrashing through a crude hunter trap in a ravaged clearing at dusk, splintered wood and flying debris around it

choices.text: Pursue the beast into the mountains

mountain_ascent.title: Mountain Ascent
mountain_ascent.text: The trail steepens as you climb above the lower woods. The air grows colder. Smears of blood mark stones and roots where the beast passed, leading toward a broken ridge high above. The path divides again. One way clings to a narrow cliff. The other disappears into a dark cave passage. Off to one side, smoke rises from what might be a lonely shelter.

imagePrompt.subject: Steep mountain trail climbing above dark pines toward jagged crags, blood trail and broken stone marking the route upward

choices.text: Take the narrow cliff path
Take the dark cave passage
Investigate the distant smoke
Turn back while you still can

cliff_path.title: Cliff Path
cliff_path.text: The cliff path is little more than a ledge hacked into stone above a deep ravine. Wind claws at your cloak. Loose scree shifts beneath your boots. One bad step would end the hunt here.

imagePrompt.subject: Narrow cliffside path above a deep ravine with loose stones and wind-bent pines clinging to the rock face

choices.text: Use your rope to secure yourself and climb safely
Force your way across the ledge
Retreat and seek the shelter instead

cave_path.title: Cave Path
cave_path.text: The cave swallows what little light remains. Old bones crunch beneath your boots. Farther in, desperate men emerge from the dark with rusted blades and hard eyes. Outlaws have made this place their den, and they are not eager to share it.

imagePrompt.subject: Dark mountain cave passage with rough stone walls, old bones, discarded packs and the hint of lurking figures deeper within

choices.text: Fight your way through the outlaws
Wait in the shadows and slip past them
Search a side chamber before moving on

trapper_shelter.title: The Mountain Trapper
trapper_shelter.text: The smoke leads you to a rough shelter built of timber, hide, and stone. An old mountain trapper watches you with guarded eyes. Spears, pelts, and iron traps hang outside his hut. When you mention the beast, he spits into the dirt and says he has seen it before. For the right price, he will part with better tools than anything sold in the village.

imagePrompt.subject: Isolated mountain trapper hut of timber and hide beside a rocky ledge, with spears, pelts and snares hanging outside
imagePrompt.exclude: village elements, bright colours, warm hospitality

choices.text: Buy a hunting spear for 25 gold
Buy a steel sword for 40 gold
Drink a mountain tonic for 12 gold and restore 25 health
Ask the trapper how best to kill the beast
Leave the shelter and continue the hunt

trapper_warning.title: The Trapper's Warning
trapper_warning.text: The trapper unrolls a crude hand-drawn map and taps a broken ridge above the tree line. 'That is where it holes up,' he says. 'If you wounded it below, you have a chance. If not, it will come at you like a storm. A spear keeps distance. A good sword helps if it gets in close. Go in tired, and you will not come out.'

imagePrompt.subject: Weathered mountain trapper inside a dim hut pointing to a crude hand-drawn map on a table lit by a single lantern
imagePrompt.exclude: magical glow, luxury interiors, multiple people

choices.text: Follow the trapper's directions to the ridge

bones_below_ridge.title: Bones Below the Ridge
bones_below_ridge.text: Beneath the broken ridge, you find a bleak hollow littered with old bones, torn hides, and the remnants of past kills. A dark cave mouth opens ahead. The smell that spills out leaves no doubt. You have found the lair.

imagePrompt.subject: Bleak rocky hollow beneath a broken mountain ridge strewn with old bones, torn hides and a dark cave mouth

choices.text: Enter the lair
Lose your nerve and turn back

beast_lair.title: The Beast's Lair
beast_lair.text: The cave narrows, then opens into a deep den stinking of blood and wet fur. Bones lie everywhere. In the darkness ahead, something massive shifts and breathes. The beast knows you are here. This ends now.

imagePrompt.subject: Deep beast den inside a mountain cave, scattered bones and old kills across the floor, a huge shadowed shape stirring in darkness

choices.text: Face the beast with whatever strength you have left
Press the attack while the wounded beast is still weakened
Hurl your throwing knife and charge in after it
Set your hunting spear and meet its charge
Draw your steel sword and close with the beast
Strike the wounded beast with a throwing knife first
Use your hunting spear against the wounded beast
Use your steel sword against the wounded beast

final_battle_unarmed.title: Final Battle
final_battle_unarmed.text: You meet the beast head-on in the dark, armed only with nerve and whatever ordinary steel you still carry. It crashes into you like a falling tree. Claws and fangs tear at you as you struggle for a killing strike.

imagePrompt.subject: Brutal close-quarters fight inside a dark cave between a lone hunter and a massive scarred beast rearing amid dust and bone

choices.text: Drive home the killing blow

final_battle_wounded.title: Final Battle
final_battle_wounded.text: The beast is still bleeding from your earlier wound, and that weakness gives you one narrow chance. Even so, the fight is savage. It hurls itself at you in blind fury, and you pay dearly for every step you take toward the kill.

imagePrompt.subject: Wounded massive beast fighting a lone hunter inside a dark cave, blood on fur and bones scattered underfoot

choices.text: Finish the beast while it staggers

final_battle_knife.title: Final Battle
final_battle_knife.text: Your throwing knife strikes first and buys you a heartbeat of advantage. It is not enough to stop the beast's charge, but it throws off its timing and keeps its jaws from your throat as the fight turns desperate.

imagePrompt.subject: Hunter hurling a knife at a charging scarred beast inside a dark cave, dust rising from the cave floor and bones scattered nearby

choices.text: Drive in and finish the beast

final_battle_knife_wounded.title: Final Battle
final_battle_knife_wounded.text: Your knife hits a beast already weakened by blood loss. Its first rush falters, and that single broken moment is enough to shift the balance. The kill is still ugly and close, but far less hopeless than it might have been.

imagePrompt.subject: Wounded scarred beast recoiling as a hunter's thrown knife strikes inside a dark bone-strewn cave

choices.text: Press your advantage and end it

final_battle_spear.title: Final Battle
final_battle_spear.text: You brace the hunting spear and meet the beast's charge with cold resolve. The reach of the weapon saves you from the worst of the first impact, though the force of the fight still leaves you bruised and bloodied before the beast finally falls.

imagePrompt.subject: Hunter bracing a hunting spear against the charge of a massive scarred beast inside a dark cave filled with bones

choices.text: Drive the spear home

final_battle_spear_wounded.title: Final Battle
final_battle_spear_wounded.text: The beast is wounded, and your spear keeps it at the edge of killing distance. The battle is still vicious, but now every stagger in its footing and every burst of pain in its flank works in your favour.

imagePrompt.subject: Wounded beast impaled on a hunter's spear inside a dark cave, cave dust and bones scattered across the floor

choices.text: Finish the beast with the spear

final_battle_sword.title: Final Battle
final_battle_sword.text: The steel sword is the best weapon you could have carried into this cave. It does not make the fight easy, but its weight and edge turn desperate defence into hard-earned control. Even so, the beast leaves its mark on you before it dies.

imagePrompt.subject: Hunter with a steel sword fighting a massive scarred beast in a dark cave with bones and torn hides on the ground

choices.text: Cut the beast down

final_battle_sword_wounded.title: Final Battle
final_battle_sword_wounded.text: Armed with steel and facing a beast already weakened, you fight with the best chance any hunter could hope for. The cave rings with snarls and steel on bone. When it is done, the monster lies still and you remain standing.

imagePrompt.subject: Wounded massive beast collapsing before a hunter with a steel sword inside a dark cave scattered with bones and torn hides

choices.text: Deliver the final stroke

victory_at_blackridge.title: Victory at Blackridge
victory_at_blackridge.text: You return to Blackridge at dawn with proof of the kill. Word spreads before you reach the square. Relief floods the village. The elder pays the promised bounty, and for the first time in many days, the people of Blackridge breathe easily. You have earned gold, reputation, and the knowledge that the road above the village is safe again.

imagePrompt.subject: Worn hunter returning to a mountain village at dawn carrying proof of a slain beast as relieved villagers gather near timber houses
imagePrompt.exclude: parade, royal court, bright festival colours

turned_back.title: Turned Back
turned_back.text: In the end, you choose life over glory and leave the hunt unfinished. The road out of Blackridge is cold and lonely. Behind you, the village remains trapped beneath the fear of claws in the dark. Perhaps someone else will take the bounty. Perhaps no one will.

imagePrompt.subject: Lone traveller leaving a mountain village by a muddy road while dark peaks loom behind and villagers watch in disappointment

slain_by_the_beast.title: Slain by the Beast
slain_by_the_beast.text: You fought as hard as any hunter could, but the mountains keep their monster. Whether in the forest, on the heights, or in the darkness of its lair, the beast leaves you broken among the stones and bones of all who failed before you.

imagePrompt.subject: A fallen hunter in darkness beneath the shadow of a huge beast, cave floor scattered with bones and torn gear

rope.description: A sturdy coil of rope, useful for climbing and crossing dangerous ground.

bait_meat.description: Fresh bloody meat that may lure hungry beasts or distract wolves.

throwing_knife.description: A balanced knife that can buy you a crucial opening in a fight.

hunting_spear.description: A heavy spear designed to meet the charge of large game at a safer distance.

steel_sword.description: A well-made blade with enough reach and weight to stand against the beast.
